title: Star Wars (2015) 26
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 26}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 26}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Star_Wars_26.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 26 |writer=[[Jason Aaron]]{{SW|url=news/adventure-and-excitement-jason-aaron-kicks-off-an-untold-yoda-tale-in-marvels-star-wars-26-exclusive-interview|text=Adventure and Excitement: Jason Aaron Kicks Off an Untold Yoda Tale in Marvel's ''Star Wars'' #26 - Exclusive Interview!}} |penciller=[[Salvador Larroca]] |inker=Salvador Larroca |letterer=[[Chris Eliopoulos]] |colorist=[[Edgar Delgado]] |cover artist=[[Stuart Immonen]] |editor=*[[Jordan D. White]] {{C|editor}} *[[Heather Antos]] {{C|assistant editor}} |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[December 28]], [[2016]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/55775/star_wars_2015_26|text=Star Wars (2015) #26}} |pages= |upc= |timeline=*c. [[40 BBY]] {{C|flashback story}}''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' *[[0 ABY]] {{C|frame story}}The frame story seen in [[Star Wars (2015) 26]]-[[Star Wars (2015) 30|30]] occurs immediately after the events of [[Star Wars (2015) 25]], which ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates to [[0 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=26 }} '''''Star Wars'' 26''' is the twenty-sixth issue of the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. Written by [[Jason Aaron]] with art by [[Salvador Larroca]], it is the first issue in the story arc [[Star Wars Book VI: Yoda's Secret War|''Book VI: Yoda's Secret War'']] that features the character [[Yoda]], set prior to [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The story was published on [[December 28]], [[2016]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''*''With one of our rebel crew captured and imprisoned…'''' ''*''…we turn once more to the journals of Ben Kenobi…'''' ''*''…and a legendary adventure of Jedi Master…Yoda!'''' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Book VI, Part I
YODA'S SECRET WAR |text=It is a time of renewed hope for the Rebel Alliance. but the Galactic Empire continues to hold its domination and has doubled its efforts to eliminate any who would stand against its rule. The Alliance's heroes, pilot Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, and smuggler-turned-soldier Han Solo, have just succeeded in stealing a massive Star Destroyer to deliver supplies to an ally planet. However, their success does not come without cost – Darth Vader enlists a group of ultra-dangerous stormtroopers, Scar Squadron, to destroy the rebels. Even though Luke, Leia, and Han escape victorious, the stormtroopers, humiliated in their defeat, vow retribution. In order to force another battle, Scar Squadron turns its focus on its new prisoner: C-3PO....}} ==Plot summary== ===A Droid Under Interrogation=== Aboard the ''[[Devastator]]'', [[C-3PO]] is being interrogated, but the troopers of [[Task Force 99|Scar Squadron]] find his constant barrage of information pointless and annoying. Worst of all? None of it reveals the location of the [[Rebel Alliance Navy|Rebel Fleet]] or their potential new base. Sergeant [[Kreel]] suggests scouring through C-3PO's memory banks, but [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] orders him and his squadron to scrap the droid for parts, threatening a similar future for them if they continue to fail him. But before they embark on that, the other troops convince Kreel to send a message to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebellion]] that their "beloved" droid is in their hands, hoping to lure them into a trap. C-3PO assures the squadron that his friends would leap at the chance to rescue him. ===A Resounding No From All But One=== Back aboard the Rebel Fleet, [[Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo]], and [[Chewbacca]] all agree that a rescue attempt would be suicidal, especially with the recent theft of a [[Star Destroyer]]. He was assigned to [[Luke Skywalker]], following [[R2-D2]]'s mission to rescue a captured [[C-3PO]]. ==Continuity== This comic book depicts the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]] existing before the [[Invasion of Naboo]]. However, the 2016 book [[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] states that the Delta-7 was created in response to the [[Naboo]] invasion.[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 26}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Star_Wars_26.jpg|Cover File:SW26Cover.jpg|Textless cover by [[Stuart Immonen]] File:Star_Wars_26_Sketch.jpg|Sketch cover by Stuart Immonen File:SW26Christopher.jpg|Action figure variant cover by [[John Tyler Christopher]]
